hero.description: From software architecture to hardware prototyping — I design complete digital products where technical skill meets aesthetics.

about.title: About Me
about.hero_description: I merge the rigor of software architecture with an aesthetic sensitivity to create complete digital experiences.
about.expertise1_desc: Full MERN & Next.js stack expertise. From Frontend UI design to Backend API architecture and database management.
about.expertise2_desc: Impactful multimedia content creation: video editing (Premiere Pro, After Effects) and graphic design of visual media.
about.expertise3_desc: Versatile technical support: diagnosis, smartphone repair, and computer hardware maintenance/assembly.
about.philosophy_default_bio: Passionate about technical innovation and visual creativity, I evolve in the digital world with a holistic approach.

projects.subtitle: Work
projects.title: My selection of works
projects.description: Applications, interfaces and solutions I have designed.
projects.empty_desc: Check back soon for new projects.

experience.subtitle: Professional Path
experience.title: Experience
experience.description_full: A retrospective of my technical evolution and the complex solutions I have deployed in professional environments.

dev_page.hero_description: Complete architectures that work, last over time, and can evolve without being rebuilt from scratch.
dev_page.service1_desc: MongoDB, Express, React, Node.js — and Next.js for rendering. Architectures that stand the test of time and can evolve without being revamped six months later.
dev_page.service2_desc: VPS configuration, Linux environment setup, system task automation. I work across Linux, macOS, and Windows without friction.
dev_page.service3_desc: I use AI as a lever for efficiency. Knowing how to write precise prompts, interpret model outputs, and integrate these tools into a workflow is a skill in itself.
dev_page.stack_description: My personal projects make up the bulk of my practice. I learned by building real things, breaking them, and rebuilding them.
dev_page.step1_desc: Audit of business needs and definition of the ideal tech stack.
dev_page.step2_desc: Modeling the database and logical flows before coding.
dev_page.step3_desc: Iterative development with continuous deployment and automated tests.
dev_page.step4_desc: Secure production launch and active performance monitoring.
dev_page.footer_cta_description: Let's discuss your technical challenges and build your next competitive advantage.

maker_page.hero_title_part1: I understand technology in both its
maker_page.hero_description: Software and hardware. Where many separate the two, I see them as a single reality. A device that no longer works is a problem to be diagnosed methodically.
maker_page.service1_desc: Methodical analysis of hardware failures — screen, battery, charging, motherboard — and component-level repair. No default replacement.
maker_page.service2_desc: Custom workstation building, RAM/storage upgrades, thermal management, and BIOS optimization for maximum performance.
maker_page.service3_desc: Design of embedded systems with Arduino, ESP32, or Raspberry Pi. From sensor to web interface, including firmware.
maker_page.footer_cta_description: Hardware, IoT, or infrastructure — let's talk about your technical challenge.

designer_page.hero_title_part1: Design is not what it looks like,
designer_page.hero_description: I create interfaces that tell a story and experiences that make users' lives easier. Aesthetics at the service of function.
designer_page.exp1_desc: High-fidelity screen design, consistent design systems, and reusable components. Focus on clarity and elegance.
designer_page.exp2_desc: Flow optimization, information architecture, and interactive prototyping to ensure smooth and intuitive navigation.
designer_page.exp3_desc: Creation of strong visual universes, logos, and style guides that reflect the DNA of your project or company.
designer_page.setup_desc1: I work with a Panasonic Lumix DMC-G7 in 4K or Full HD as needed, complemented by an iPhone 13 Pro Max for situations requiring more mobility.
designer_page.setup_desc2: Framing, available light, in-the-moment composition — that's determined on-site. Post-production requires just as much judgment.
designer_page.format1_desc: A wedding is a shot you don't get a second chance at. Responsiveness and technical mastery are inseparable.
designer_page.format2_desc: A documentary is a narrative built in the editing room from hours of rushes. Rigor and sensitivity.
designer_page.format3_desc: A music video is a work of artistic direction, rhythm, and color grading. Every second carries a visual intention.
designer_page.step1_desc: Finding the best angle and managing light for a cinematic look.
designer_page.step2_desc: Constructing a smooth and impactful story, orchestrating rhythm and intent.
designer_page.step3_desc: Colorimetry to give a clean and consistent visual identity to each project.
designer_page.step4_desc: Encoding adapted to the constraints of each platform (YouTube, Instagram, Web).
designer_page.footer_cta_description: Let's bring your ideas to life with a design that leaves a lasting impression.

info.sla: I respond to every request within 24 business hours.
